title: I wonder if the number of use of automation function is deducted when calling API
excerpt: I understand that there is a limit to the number of automation functions per plan. I wonder if the limited number of automation functions will be deducted when the API is called.

posts.author: thlee (Taeho Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: I understand that there is a limit to the number of automation functions per plan. I wonder if the limited number of automation functions will be deducted when the API is called.
